sourcesContent:
import { Row, Text, Grid, Button } from "@nextui-org/react";
import React from "react";

export default function ProjectsSection() {
  return (
    <section id="about">
      <Row justify="center" align="center" css={{ mt: "80px" }}>
        <Text h6>Check Out My</Text>
      </Row>
      <Row justify="center" align="center">
        <Text
          h5
          css={{
            textGradient: "45deg, $pink600 -20%, $purple600 100%",
          }}
          weight="bold"
        >
          Recent Projects
        </Text>
      </Row>
      <Grid.Container gap={2} justify="center" css={{ mt: "50px" }} gap={3}>
        <Grid xs={12} sm={6}>
          <Row
            justify="center"
            align="center"
            css={{ mt: "-50px", position: "relative" }}
          >
            <div className="about-img-backdrop" />
          </Row>
        </Grid>
        <Grid xs={12} sm={6}>
          <Row
            justify="center"
            align="center"
            css={{ mt: "-50px", position: "relative" }}
          >
            <div className="about-img-backdrop" />
          </Row>
        </Grid>
      </Grid.Container>
    </section>
  );
}
